shareDebugInfoDialogDescription: Enabling this will share additional information with our analytics service to help us diagnose issues, including:
shareDebugInfoRisk1: Your email address and team ID
shareDebugInfoRisk3: Your IP address and precise location
shareDebugInfoNote: This data is sent to PostHog (EU servers). You can disable this at any time to return to fully anonymous mode.
emptyStateTitle: It's a bit empty in here...
pickStaffMember: Pick a staff member to view their availability
cannotMakeUnavailable: Cannot make this user unavailable - at least one user must be available for each time slot to allow optimization.
deletePostsConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} post(s)?
onceDeletedNoUndo: Once deleted, it can't be undone.
resetAllUserAvailabilityToAvailable: Reset all user availability to available
deleteStaffConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} staff member(s)?
resetAllAvailabilityDescription: Are you sure you want to reset all users' availability to "available" for all time slots? This will clear any custom availability settings you may have configured.
clickToAddWorker: Click the + button to add a new worker
clearAllAssignmentsDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete all shift assignments.
mobileNotReady: This app isn't ready for mobile users, yet. Stay tuned.
scheduleTransitionConfirm: This will transition the schedule to {{state}}. This action affects all team members.
unableToCalculateShiftTimes: Unable to calculate valid shift times with current parameters.
unableToCalculateShiftDuration: Unable to calculate valid shift duration with current parameters.
endTimeAfterStartTime: End time must be after start time (overnight shifts not supported)
howItWorksDetail: {{posts}} posts × {{staff}} staff members = {{shifts}} shifts with {{duration}}h duration (rounded to hour/half-hour).
syncedDescription: Synced - All changes saved and optimized
outOfSyncDescription: Out of sync - Failed to save changes
notOptimizedDescription: Not optimized - Click Optimize to generate assignments
upgradeDescription: is available on the Pro plan. Upgrade to unlock collaborative scheduling, staff invitations, and more.
tapOptimizeToGenerate: Tap the optimize button to generate assignments
tapToAddFirstStaff: Tap + to add your first staff member
cannotOptimizeEditMode: Cannot optimize: Currently in edit mode.
cannotOptimizeSyncing: Cannot optimize: Data is currently syncing.
cannotOptimizeOutOfSync: Cannot optimize: Data is out of sync.
cannotOptimizeNoUsers: Cannot optimize: No users or constraints available.
optimizeWithNewConstraints: Optimize current assignments with potentially new constraints.
optimizationInfeasible: Not enough staff to cover all shifts. Try adding more staff, reducing posts, or adjusting availability.
problematicTimeSlots: Problematic time slots where no users are available
fixAvailabilityHint: To fix this, please ensure at least one user is available for each of these time slots in the Availability tab.
optimizationSuccess: Shift assignments have been optimized successfully
optimizationError: An unexpected error occurred during optimization. Please try again.
howItWorksDetail7d: {{posts}} posts × {{staff}} staff members × 7 days = {{shifts}} shifts/day with {{duration}}h duration (rounded to hour/half-hour).
